info.heading: Making Mortgage Simple & Stress-Free
info.paragraph: At Pingal Capital, we specialize in providing mortgage solutions tailored to your financial profile. Whether you're purchasing your first property, refinancing an existing mortgage, or unlocking equity from your home — our expert advisors guide you through every step with clarity and speed.

features.title: Flexible Capital Structures
features.description: Customized repayment terms and zero prepayment penalties across all mortgage tiers.

items.question: What is a Loan Against Property?
items.answer: A Loan Against Property is a secured loan where you can avail funds by pledging your property as collateral. The loan amount depends on your property's market value and repayment capacity.

items.question: Can I use the funds for personal purposes?
items.answer: Yes — funds from a LAP can be used for a wide range of personal and business needs such as education, medical expenses, debt consolidation, or business investment.

items.question: Is the interest rate lower than a personal loan?
items.answer: Yes — since LAP is a secured loan backed by property, interest rates are generally lower than unsecured loans like personal loans.

items.question: How long is the repayment tenure?
items.answer: Most lenders offer flexible repayment tenures, typically up to 15 years or more, based on lender policies and eligibility.

items.question: What documents do I need to apply?
items.answer: You need identity & address proof, income documents, bank statements, and property papers. Additional documents may be required based on lender and applicant profile.
